creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
Exp-run looks fine.

You can find some ports that are related to kf5 and fail to build with clang 6 at:

http://package22.nyi.freebsd.org/build.html?mastername=headamd64-default-PR225155&build=2018-01-16_16h21m26s
http://package23.nyi.freebsd.org/build.html?mastername=headi386-default-PR225155&build=2018-01-16_16h21m22s
